amount.description: Transaction amount. Number in cents. E.g. 1000 represents $10.00

authorized_date.description: Date that the transaction is authorized. ISO 8601 format ( YYYY-MM-DD ).

check_number.description: Check number of the transaction. This field will be null if not a check transaction.

date.description: For pending transactions, this represents the date of the transaction occurred; for posted transactions, this represents the date of the transaction posted. ISO 8601 format ( YYYY-MM-DD ).

is_pending.description: Indicates the transaction is pending or unsettled if true.

payment_channel.description: channel used to make a payment

x-enumDescriptions.OTHER: Transactions that relate to banks, e.g. fees or deposits.

payment_method.description: Transfer type of the transaction, e.g. ACH
